name: verimem
displayName: Verimem — verified memory for AI agents
description: Give Claude Code a hippocampus with a notary at the door: persistent episodic+semantic+procedural memory with a write-time anti-confabulation admission gate (source⊢fact entailment) and provenance on every read, plus sleep-cycle consolidation and compiled procedural macros.

verimem.description: Verimem MCP server — persistent episodic + semantic + procedural memory with a write-admission gate. Exposes the full memory toolset: recall/remember, episode + fact management, skill discovery & promotion, sleep-cycle consolidation, health/status, and lineage tracing. Core entry points: hippo_recall, hippo_remember, hippo_record_episode, hippo_consolidate, hippo_status, hippo_skills_for.

hippo:status.description: Show Verimem memory stats: episodes, skills, semantic facts.

hippo:consolidate.description: Force a sleep-cycle consolidation now (replay + skill compile + bundle abstraction).

hippo:bench.description: Run the compositional generalization bench against the configured LLM.
